name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BraceForImpactHelper.RollType
summary: 0 = original/roll off/stay on car:  Roll with character velocity, 1 = //Gentle: roll off/stay on car = use relative velocity of character to car to roll against, 2 = //roll over car:  Roll against character velocity.  i.e. roll against any velocity picked up by hitting car, 3 = //Gentle: roll over car:  use relative velocity of character to car to roll with.
remarks:
Default value = 3.
            Min value = 0.
            Max value = 3.
